title: Fuller Copper Bulbs
description: Changes the copper bulb to make the texture less segmented.
body:
This resourcepack changes the copper bulbs to become fuller through removing the segmenting in the texture.
The edges of the texture are still from the base game, but the middle is changed. A simple tweak that is good for redstone displays or if you want to change up the look of your game.

![A simple presentation of the bulbs](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a2d66591eeb09df7a3de42564fce8ba7adae7f28.png)
